summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the redesigned landing page. All 18 tests passed. Landing page displays certification photo as hero background, 'Training Complete' green badge, gold 'Post-Training Evaluation' CTA button, disabled 'Pre-Training Assessment' button with 'Closed' label, Training Session Gallery with correct Day 1/2/3 Google Drive links, and Alumni Network section. Navigation flows work correctly. Admin link and dashboard still functional.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue from Recharts, charts still render correctly. Known issue from previous iteration.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign fully tested. All features working: hero with certification photo background (qhq9e7cb_image.png), Training Complete badge, Post-Training Evaluation gold CTA navigates to /post-evaluation, Pre-Training Assessment disabled with 'Closed' label, Gallery cards link to correct Google Drive folders (Day 1/2/3), Alumni section CTA links to /post-evaluation, Admin link works. Note: /assessment direct URL redirects to landing page if no email in localStorage (expected behavior).
